Garten_Bar_Checklist (1).xlsx: GÄRTEN - BAR AREA CHECKLIST
Branch: [Trivium / Lake Town]    Date: __________    Shift: [AM / PM]
Section
Task Description
Completed?
Issues Faced
Action Taken
Signature
Photo Ref
Timestamp
OPENING - BAR AREA
Station Setup: Sanitize bar counter (top and bottom), sinks, and prep surfaces.
Equipment Check: Turn on coffee machine, blender, and juicers; ensure all are working.
Coffee Calibration: Dial in espresso grinder, check extraction time and temperature.
Bar Tools: Organize shakers, strainers, spoons, and jiggers; ensure all are present.
Prep & Stock: Prepare garnishes (citrus, herbs), check syrups and juices.
Ice Supply: Fill ice bins with fresh, clean ice.
Glassware: Ensure all glasses are polished and stored correctly.
Fridge Check: Check temperatures, restock bottled drinks (FIFO).
Drains & Sinks: Ensure bar drains are clean and sinks are organized.
Expiry Dates: Check expiry dates of all bar products.
Stock Analysis: Check and analyze stock levels for daily sales.
CLOSING - BAR AREA
Equipment Cleaning: Backflush espresso machine, clean blender jars.
Surface Sanitation: Deep clean bar mats, sinks, and counters.
Stock Inventory: Record low items, store perishables in fridge.
Fridge Maintenance: Wipe down fridge interiors, check seals.
Glassware: Wash and polish all used glassware.
Trash & Drains: Empty bar bins, flush drains with hot water/sanitizer.
Power Down: Turn off non-essential bar equipment.

Garten_Service_Checklist.xlsx: GÄRTEN - SERVICE AREA CHECKLIST
Branch: [Trivium / Lake Town]    Date: __________    Shift: [AM / PM]
Section
Task Description
Completed?
Issues Faced
Action Taken
Signature
Photo Ref
Timestamp
OPENING - EXTERIOR & ENTRANCE
Entrance & Exterior: Sweep entrance, clean glass doors, check signage.
Glass & Mirrors: Ensure all entrance glass and mirrors are clean and shiny.
Black Pillars/Columns: Wipe down and ensure they are dust-free.
Outdoor Area: Sweep floor and ensure floor dividers are clean.
Outdoor Furniture: Clean tables (top and bottom) and ensure chairs are clean and stable.
Heaters: Check condition of gas/electric heaters.
Plants: Ensure all plants are clean and healthy.
Lighting: Check that all outdoor lighting is clean and functioning.
OPENING - DINING AREA (INDOOR)
Dining Area: Align tables/chairs, check for wobbles, wipe surfaces.
Table Setup: Place clean menus, polished cutlery, napkins, and condiments.
Condiments: Ensure salt, pepper, ashtrays, and menu holders are clean and full.
Decoration: Wipe down all indoor decorations and ensure they are dust-free.
Walls & Fences: Clean black walls and fences, ensuring they are dust-free.
Curtains: Check that curtains are clean and in good condition.
Under Tables: Ensure the area under every table is clean and free of stickers/debris.
Side Stations: Stock with extra napkins, cutlery, water carafes, and menus; ensure they are organized.
Lighting & Ambience: Set lights to standard, start background music.
Restrooms: Check cleanliness, stock toilet paper, soap, and towels.
POS System: Log in, check printer paper, ensure cash drawer is ready and cables are organized.
Camera System: Verify that the camera system is working correctly.
Fire Safety: Ensure fire extinguishers are present and in their designated places.
Staff Briefing: Review daily specials, 86'd items, and shift goals.
Uniform & Grooming: Ensure all staff meet grooming and uniform standards (clean, ironed, complete).
CLOSING - SERVICE AREA
Guest Check: Ensure all guests have departed before starting procedures.
Table Clearing: Clear all remaining items, sanitize tables and chairs.
Floor Care: Sweep and mop the entire dining area (indoor and outdoor).
Side Stations: Clean and restock for the next shift.
Menu Maintenance: Wipe down all menus and discard damaged ones.
Trash Removal: Empty all FOH bins and sanitize.
POS Closing: Reconcile cash, print end-of-day reports, log out.
Security: Lock all doors, turn off non-essential lights and music.

OPENING - SHISHA AREA
Area Prep: Sweep shisha lounge, arrange seating and cushions.
Equipment Inspection: Check shisha pipes for cracks or leaks.
Cleaning: Sanitize hoses and bases, ensure they are dry and odor-free.
Coal Station: Prepare coal burners, ensure adequate coal supply.
Tobacco Stock: Organize flavors, check freshness and stock levels.
Accessories: Stock disposable tips, tongs, and foil/HMDs.
Ventilation: Turn on exhaust fans, check air quality.
CLOSING - SHISHA AREA
Coal Safety: Safely extinguish all remaining coals in water/sand.
Pipe Breakdown: Disassemble shishas, empty bases, rinse thoroughly.
Hose Care: Hang hoses to dry, sanitize handles.
Station Cleanup: Clean coal burners and surrounding area.
Inventory: Record tobacco usage, store containers airtight.
Trash Removal: Empty ash trays and shisha area bins.
Power Down: Turn off coal burners and exhaust fans.
